name: File and Directory Discovery via PowerShell
description: Detects the use of PowerShell to enumerate files and directories, a common technique used by attackers for reconnaissance.

prompts.prompt: PowerShell command for file and directory discovery detected, indicating potential reconnaissance activity. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}, **Script Block Text** {ScriptBlockText}. Investigate this activity for unauthorized system enumeration.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for PowerShell Script Block logging (4103).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed the PowerShell command.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.

parameters.name: ScriptBlockText
parameters.description: The full script block text of the PowerShell command, containing file/directory enumeration cmdlets.
